_comment: PARSER-ONLY fixture. Sourced verbatim from scif-backend src/api/substrate_anchor.rs::tests::attest_response_parses (a JSON-deserialization unit test). The on_chain_hash and substrate_hex were chosen by the test author to be plausible-shaped 32- and 58-byte values respectively, NOT to be a cryptographically valid pair. Running `h33-verify verify` against this fixture will correctly FAIL the deterministic signing_message check — that failure is the verifier doing its job.
_use_for: Confirm h33-verify decodes a structurally valid substrate (version, computation_type, all field offsets).
Confirm h33-verify catches a synthetic/forged receipt where on_chain_hash != SHA3-256(substrate_hex).
_do_not_use_for: Asserting that on_chain_hash matches the substrate (it does not, by construction).
